plan_items.title: Foundation — shared types, interfaces, DB schema, config, utilities
plan_items.goal: Create all shared code and configuration for the backend, including TypeScript interfaces, DB schema (PostgreSQL), environment validation, and utility functions. This includes all models, enums, and types used by routes/controllers, as well as the SQL schema and seed logic.
plan_items.validation: Run `npm run build` and verify all types compile; run `psql` and apply `schema.sql` to confirm schema is valid; run `ts-node src/db/seed.ts` and confirm tables are seeded with correct data.

plan_items.title: Plants & Distribution Centers — CRUD endpoints and controllers
plan_items.goal: Implement CRUD endpoints and controllers for plants and distribution centers, including input validation, error handling, and DB integration.
plan_items.validation: Start backend, call all `/plants` and `/distribution-centers` endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), verify correct DB changes and error codes for invalid input.

plan_items.title: Orders — CRUD endpoints and business rules
plan_items.goal: Implement CRUD endpoints and controllers for orders, enforcing all business rules (quantity >= 1, status enum, delivery_date logic), input validation, and error handling.
plan_items.validation: Start backend, call all `/orders` endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) with valid and invalid data, verify business rules and error codes.

plan_items.title: Metrics — KPIs, trends, and volume endpoints
plan_items.goal: Implement endpoints for metrics: `/kpis`, `/trends`, `/volume-by-plant`, including query param filters, correct calculations (compliance rate, avg delivery time, etc.), and aggregation logic.
plan_items.validation: Start backend, call `/kpis`, `/trends`, `/volume-by-plant` with and without filters, verify calculations match requirements and data is correct.

plan_items.title: Backend App Bootstrap — Express app, DB connection, error handling, healthcheck
plan_items.goal: Implement backend app bootstrap: Express app setup, DB connection pooling, error handling middleware, healthcheck endpoint, and server startup.

files.purpose: Express app setup, registers all routers, error handler
HTTP server bootstrap, connects to DB, runs migrations/seeds, starts server on port 23001

plan_items.validation: Build and run backend container, verify `/health` returns status, all routers are registered, and errors are handled gracefully.

plan_items.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
plan_items.goal: Complete Docker orchestration and local setup: docker-compose for backend, PostgreSQL, Redis; healthchecks; environment templates; run script; documentation.

files.purpose: Services: backend (23001), postgres (25432), redis (26379), healthchecks, depends_on
Validates Docker, builds, starts, waits for healthy, prints backend URL
Prerequisites, setup, run instructions, endpoint summary

plan_items.validation: Run `./run.sh`, confirm all containers healthy, backend accessible at `http://localhost:23001`, DB seeded, all endpoints respond.
